failures.description: The catalog search dependency timed out, preventing the agent from obtaining the required product evidence.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The agent's goal and plan matched the user request: search the product catalog for available bagged vacuum cleaners costing more than $591.59. The first failure occurs when the ProductCatalogSearch tool is called at step 3 and returns an explicit infrastructure error: CatalogServiceTimeoutError, with the message that the catalog search dependency timed out after 30000ms. The invocation appears well-formed and matches the planned query, so this is not an invalid invocation. There is no access/guardrail block. The error is not resolved later; subsequent steps only report that the task could not be completed.
